name: Source Fidelity review for Lysosomal Restoration bundle
summary: The staged source, study, and finding records are faithful to the cited source boundaries. The animal records stay in mouse or C. elegans contexts, the ambroxol records correctly separate open-label target engagement, randomized PDD target engagement without confirmed cognitive benefit, and phase 3 protocol status, and the staged outlook cites these records without turning protocol activity into efficacy evidence.

findings.claim_or_issue: The human source-fidelity support is disease-specific ambroxol target engagement in Parkinson disease contexts, not a broad human aging trial.
findings.why_it_matters: The staged outlook can support human_biomarker_signal only if the Parkinson disease and GCase-centered boundary remains visible.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the existing disease-specific, biomarker-only wording through editorial review and publication.
